name: badge
description: A small status pill mapping each variant (neutral, success, warning, danger, info) to a status-token fill + foreground pair. Server-first PARTIAL (ADR-0012, Wave 4): variant-to-colour is pure, so there is no client state and no island. Replaces the <lv-badge> Lit island. Plain HTML span + Tailwind + --lv-* tokens, zero JS, CSP-clean.
docs: Copies the badge partial to your JTE root at lievit/badge.jte, reached as @template.lievit.badge(variant=..., label="..."). Variant drives the fill + foreground tokens; pass label for plain text or a content slot for rich children (content wins). The source is yours: edit freely.
